title: desmodium axillare var. genuinum
intro: Desmodium axillare var. genuinum, also known as Sticktight or Stick-tight, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for wounds and ulcers. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for various health conditions.
